name: Toon Ancient Gear Golem
name_jp: トゥーン・アンティーク・ギアゴーレム
desc: Cannot attack the turn it is Summoned. While you control "Toon World" and your opponent controls no Toon monsters, this card can attack your opponent directly. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap until the end of the Damage Step.
mnst_eff: Cannot attack the turn it is Summoned. While you control "Toon World" and your opponent controls no Toon monsters, this card can attack your opponent directly. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap until the end of the Damage Step.
eff: Cannot attack the turn it is Summoned. While you control "Toon World" and your opponent controls no Toon monsters, this card can attack your opponent directly. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, your opponent cannot activate any Spell/Trap until the end of the Damage Step.

sets.set: Dragons of Legend: The Complete Series
Speed Duel GX: Duel Academy Box

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
attack: Cannot attack the turn it is Summoned
